content_body:
Best North Georgia Vacation Cabin Rentals


Riverview Lodge

We are a family owned and operated cabin rental company offering the best North GA vacation cabin rentals in Blue Ridge, GA. Our luxury cabins offer an experience coupled with outdoor adventures providing that perfect mountain getaway you crave. Whether it's a romantic 2-bedroom Blue Ridge cabin or a spacious 5-bedroom lodge, each property is uniquely situated in the heart of Blue Ridge, boasting breathtaking views of the mountains or the sparkling waters of North Georgia's rivers.

We offer several options for fishing cabins on the Toccoa River, Noontootla Creek, and Fightingtown Creek. Sit on your beautifully furnished porch and soak in the quietness and beauty of the North Georgia Mountains.

For the kids, many of our cabins are kid friendly (and pet-friendly) offering awesome game rooms, hiking around the cabin, and proximity to Downtown Blue Ridge where kids can lose themselves in pinball arcades, candy and game shops, mini-golf, and so much more.

Experience Blue Ridge

Aska Escape Lodge

Explore and experience Blue Ridge, GA and the surrounding North Georgia Mountains on your next vacation. Blue Ridge has it all: waterfall hikes, trout fishing, tubing the Toccoa River, whitewater rafting the Ocoee River, boating on Lake Blue Ridge, zip lining, wineries & breweries, golfing, and so much more! 

Luxury Blue Ridge Cabin Amenities


The Rivers Edge

Our Blue Ridge cabins come equipped with top-tier amenities including outdoor fireplaces, fire pits, hot tubs, state-of-the-art game rooms, beautiful surroundings for exploration, and even concierge services through our local Blue Ridge partnerships. Providing unique amenities for our guests helps to create a memorable North Georgia vacation, and many of our guests have found that special cabin that they come back to several times during the year and beyond.

Plan your Blue Ridge Mountain escape and find your ideal North GA vacation cabin using our Cabin Search. Give us a call at 706-432-2140 and we will help you find the perfect Blue Ridge cabin rental.
title: North Georgia Cabin Rentals
